result.finding: MIT License held by Microsoft Corporation. Key dependencies are Spring Boot (Apache 2.0), Oracle JDBC ojdbc8 (Oracle Technology Network License), and commons-io (Apache 2.0).
evidence: LICENSE file at project root: MIT License, Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation
Spring Boot (Apache License 2.0) — open source, permissive
ojdbc8 Oracle JDBC driver — Oracle Technology Network (OTN) License, free for development use
values: Oracle JDBC (ojdbc8): Oracle Technology Network License
Note: Oracle JDBC driver license may have redistribution restrictions in commercial deployments
